data.title: GREEN: Update onboarding SKILL.md Step 2b with per-stack defaults and key-presence preservation
data.description:
## testing_mode: GREEN

Update plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md Step 2b to write stack-specific defaults for commands.lint, commands.format, and commands.format_check.

## Changes to plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md

### 1. Add commands.format_check to the commands category table (currently line 1252)
Update the 'commands' row from:
  | commands | commands.test, commands.lint, commands.format | Commands area answers |
To:
  | commands | commands.test, commands.lint, commands.format, commands.format_check | Commands area answers |

### 2. Add per-stack defaults section AFTER the 'Detect and Merge with Existing Config' block
Insert a new subsection '#### Per-Stack Command Defaults' before 'Required Config Keys':

Per-stack defaults for commands.lint, commands.format, commands.format_check:

| Stack | commands.lint | commands.format | commands.format_check |
|-------|--------------|-----------------|----------------------|
| python-poetry | ruff check . | ruff format . | ruff format --check . |
| node-npm / node-yarn | eslint --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern | prettier --write . | prettier --check . |
| ruby / ruby-bundler | bundle exec rubocop | bundle exec rubocop --autocorrect | bundle exec rubocop |

These defaults are written if the key is not already set in the config.

### 3. Add key-presence preservation logic in Step 2b
After writing each commands.* key, check for existing value:
  - If existing value is non-empty: emit [DSO INFO] commands.<key> already set ('<existing>') — skipping and leave unchanged
  - If existing value is empty string: treat as not-set, write the default
  - If key absent: write the per-stack default

### 4. Add step ordering note
Insert a note before the per-stack defaults section:
  **Step ordering**: Write commands.test_runner (from Epic A / 87e9-0bc8) BEFORE writing commands.lint, commands.format, and commands.format_check. If Epic A has not landed, commands.test_runner may be absent — proceed with commands.lint/format/format_check writes.

## Files to modify
- plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md

## Acceptance criteria
- RED tests from Task aaed-b41e pass GREEN
- Ruby defaults present: bundle exec rubocop for all three keys
- Node.js defaults present: eslint + prettier
- [DSO INFO] language present for key-presence skip
- commands.test_runner step ordering note present
- Empty-string treated as not-set documented
